title: Ortholoma serratum
taxonomy: Ortholoma serratum belongs to the family Asteraceae and is classified under the order Asterales. It is a species of flowering plant that is native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant is known to be a perennial herb with serrated leaves, growing in well-drained soils. It is often found in dry and sandy areas, thriving in full sun. The specific classification of Ortholoma serratum is further categorized under the genus Ortholoma.
